calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Karen Farnsworth, #5162.

Petitioner, Valeria Weber, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor Johnny Reb Barber, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Johnny Reb Weber.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
